escalation.rationale: Iran strikes Tel Aviv and threatens regional energy infrastructure while US considers military action against Iranian nuclear facilities.

ticker_items: Iran strikes central Tel Aviv, hitting bridge with missiles
US eases Iranian oil sanctions to contain surging energy prices
Iran threatens to destroy regional energy sites if attacked
Trump considers 'winding down' Iran war amid rising costs
20+ countries unite to guarantee Strait of Hormuz passage

eastern_europe.description: Ukrainian drone attacks repelled near Bashneft oil refineries in Bashkortostan region

middle_east.description: Israeli forces struck weapon factories and ballistic missile facilities in Tehran.
Israeli military launched wave of strikes targeting Hezbollah positions in Beirut.
Iran launched ballistic missiles targeting US base at Diego Garcia.
Iranian missiles struck southern Israel after penetrating air defense systems.
Iranian strike hits bridge in central Tel Aviv startling pedestrians
Iran allegedly launches missiles at joint UK-US base in Indian Ocean
Israeli strike reportedly hits Iran's Natanz nuclear facility
Hezbollah attack kills one person in northern Israel

russia.text: Russia proposed halting intelligence sharing with Iran if the US stopped giving Ukraine intel
russia.speaker: Unknown Russian Official
russia.title: Government Official

middle_east.text: Iran was two weeks from nuclear bomb, says U.S. has decimated regime but must stay to stop rebuild
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: Don't need Strait of Hormuz; Japan, China should get involved little bit
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: We will target American ships and warships in the Red Sea if the United States participates in any attack alongside Israel against Iran
middle_east.speaker: Yemeni Armed Forces
middle_east.title: Military Statement

middle_east.text: We will irreversibly destroy vital infrastructure across region if power plants targeted
middle_east.speaker: Iranian officials
middle_east.title: Government representatives

middle_east.text: Pentagon is getting close to meeting our objectives
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Seoul is actively communicating with Iran to normalize shipping through the Strait of Hormuz. South Korea is monitoring the Middle East situation and working to protect its citizens and energy transport while joining international coordination efforts.

President Macron condemned Israeli ground operations and airstrikes on Lebanon as 'unacceptable' and violating international law. France maintains diplomatic opposition to the expanding Middle East conflict.

Hungary continues to block the €90bn EU loan package to Ukraine despite the bloc's attempts to break the veto. This action reflects Hungary's position of limiting Western support for Ukraine amid the broader regional conflicts.
Finland joined 19 other countries condemning Iran's attacks on commercial vessels but explicitly stated it will not participate in military operations in the Persian Gulf.

financial.notes: Energy prices surge as Strait of Hormuz closure halts one-fifth of global oil and gas supply, prompting US to ease Iranian sanctions.

update_log.text: Iran threatens to destroy regional energy infrastructure if US and Israel target power plants
Iranian missile strike hits bridge in central Tel Aviv according to reports
Hezbollah attack kills one person in northern Israel as Lebanon assault continues
Iran allegedly launches missiles at UK-US base on Diego Garcia island
Trump threatens to obliterate Iran power plants unless Strait of Hormuz reopens
Israeli settlers set fire to homes and cars near Jenin in West Bank violence
Iran launches ballistic missiles at US Diego Garcia base according to reports
Israel strikes weapon factories in Tehran and Hezbollah positions in Beirut
Iranian missiles penetrate Israeli air defenses hitting southern Israel
